16 User: That makes sense. I will start today.

19 Assistant: Careful reflection and action can work well together.
20 User: I will remember that and keep moving forward.
21 Assistant: Small actions often create momentum.
22 User: I can begin with that.
23 Assistant: It helps to be patient with your own process.
24 User: That gives me a better way to think about it.
